2.4.6-headings-and-labels.remarks: All headings and labels are descriptive: facets use field display names, search box has descriptive aria-label, sort combobox labeled 'Sort by', pager nav labeled 'Pagination' with 'Page N' radio buttons, products-per-page uses descriptive group label, refine-modal uses H1/H2 section headings, recommendation list uses descriptive heading.
